title: Agrostopoa wallisii
taxonomy: Agrostopoa wallisii is classified within the family Poaceae, commonly known as the grass family. It belongs to the subfamily Pooideae and is a member of the tribe Poeae. Further classification places it within the genus Agrostopoa, which is a small group of grasses native to New Zealand. The species is thought to be closely related to the genus Colobanthus. Agrostopoa wallisii is considered a rare and endangered species due to its limited distribution and habitat loss.
